content:
Beautiful 2 bed / 2 bath apartment in the heart of SF Financial District. ONLY $1,400/month! All utilities included.
I am currently working overseas on a missionary trip, so I cannot show you the apartment in person.
To secure this limited-time offer, please send a $500 securely via Zelle or Wire Transfer to prove you have the funds, and I will express mail the keys to you next day air. God bless! First come, first served.

URGENT: Work From Home Data Entry Clerk Needed!
Salary: $45.00 / Hour
No Experience Required! Full training provided.
We are impressed with your resume on Indeed. Before we begin, you must purchase the required software bundle and Apple MacBook from our approved vendor. We will send you a check for $4,500 to cover these expenses. Please deposit the check immediately and send $4,000 to our vendor via Apple Gift Cards.

Hey bro! Are you still trading crypto? I just found a crazy new arbitrage bot on Telegram. It guarantees a 300% monthly return. I put in 1 ETH yesterday and already got 1.5 ETH back out to my wallet. The spots are super limited because of network congestion, so you have to click this link and connect your Metamask right now to reserve a node. Let me know when you've connected so I can send you the invite code.

Available June 1st: 1 Bedroom apartment in SoMa, San Francisco. Rent is $3,200/month. 12-month lease required. Security deposit is 1 month's rent. Building amenities include a gym, shared rooftop, and in-unit washer/dryer. Pets are allowed with an additional $50/mo pet rent and $500 pet deposit. Viewings are available this Saturday from 11 AM to 2 PM. Please bring your credit report and recent pay stubs if you plan to submit an application. Contact Avalon Property Management at 415-555-0199 or leasing@avalonbay.com.
